message:
feat(extras): Add tracing-to-console logging integration (bd-1ho.7)

Implement a tracing_subscriber::Layer that formats events as styled
Segments and routes them through the Console abstraction. This
respects ftui's one-writer rule by never writing directly to
stdout/stderr.

Key components:
- TracingConsoleLayer: thread-safe Layer impl with Mutex<Console>
- TracingConfig: configurable timestamp, level, target, fields, source
- Level-specific styling (ERROR=bold red, WARN=yellow, INFO=green,
  DEBUG=blue dim, TRACE=dim)
- EventVisitor: extracts message and structured fields from events
- Poison recovery on mutex for robustness

Feature-gated behind "logging" which depends on "console" + tracing +
tracing-subscriber. Also adds unicode-segmentation to "console" deps
(was missing, caused compile errors).

17 tests covering construction, styling, thread safety, and output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,21 +16,25 @@ image = { version = "0.25.9", default-features = false, features = ["png", "gif"
 pulldown-cmark = { version = "0.12", default-features = false, optional = true }
 portable-pty = { version = "0.8.1", optional = true }
 tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", optional = true }
 unicode-segmentation = { version = "1", optional = true }
 unicode-width = { version = "0.2", optional = true }
 
 [features]
 canvas = ["dep:ftui-core", "dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-widgets"]
 charts = ["canvas"]
 clipboard = ["dep:base64", "dep:ftui-core"]
-console = ["dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-text", "dep:unicode-width"]
+console = ["dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-text", "dep:unicode-segmentation", "dep:unicode-width"]
 clipboard-fallback = ["clipboard"]
 clipboard-logging = ["clipboard", "dep:tracing"]
 image = ["dep:base64", "dep:ftui-core", "dep:image"]
 markdown = ["dep:pulldown-cmark", "dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-text"]
 export = ["dep:ftui-render"]
 forms = ["dep:ftui-core", "dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-widgets", "dep:unicode-segmentation", "dep:unicode-width"]
 pty-capture = ["dep:portable-pty"]
-syntax = ["dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style"]
+logging = ["console", "dep:tracing", "dep:tracing-subscriber"]
+syntax = ["dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-text"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+tracing = "0.1"
+tracing-subscriber = "0.3"
